title: ECOGEO 'Omics Training: 3.2 Amplicon Analysis - QIIME
author: Melissa Dsouza
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.fjbbkin

steps.title: Validate Mapping File Format
steps.instruction: Checking mapping file format $ validate_mapping_file.py -m map_file.txt -o mapping_file_output

steps.title: Join Paired-End Reads
steps.instruction: Join paired end reads $ join_paired_ends.py -f Undetermined_S0_L001_R1_001.fastq -r Undetermined_S0_L001_R2_001.fastq -b Undetermined_S0_L001_I1_001.fastq -o reads

steps.title: Demultiplex and Quality Filter
steps.instruction: Depmultiplex & quality filter $ split_libraries_fastq.py -i fastqjoin.join.fastq -b fastqjoin.join_barcodes.fastq -o split -m map_file.txt -q 29 --barcode_type 12 --store_demultiplexed_fastq

steps.title: De Novo OTU Picking
steps.instruction: De novo OTU picking $ pick_de_novo_otus.py -i subs_seqs_q.fasta -o uclust_otus/

steps.title: Open-Reference OTU Picking
steps.instruction: Open-reference OTU picking $ pick_open_reference_otus.py -i subs_seqs_q.fasta -r $PWD/gg_13_8_otus/rep_set/97_otus.fasta -o uclust_open_otu

steps.title: Add Metadata to BIOM Table
steps.instruction: $ biom add-metadata -i $PWD/otu_table_even10.biom -o denovo_otu.biom --sample-metadata-fp map_file.txt --observation-metadata-fp $PWD/uclust_assigned_taxonomy/subs_seqs_q_rep_set_tax_assignments.txt --observation-header OTUID,taxonomy --sc-separated taxonomy
